query: ok so we just got a ticket from the mobile team — they need us to add push notification support for order status updates. the backend is in Go, notifications service is in services/notifications/, and we use Firebase for push. The PM wants it by end of sprint. Can you help me figure out what exactly needs to happen before we start coding?

we have a bug in production — users are reporting that the search results page shows stale data after they update their profile. I filed it as SEARCH-482. Before we dive into fixing it, let's make sure we understand the problem properly and figure out the scope

hey I just got this from my tech lead: 'we need to migrate the payment processing from Stripe v2 to v3 API'. That's literally all the context I got. Can you help me turn this into something actionable?

I need to prepare this task for our planning session tomorrow — the task is about adding rate limiting to our public API. We use Express.js, the API gateway is in services/gateway/. I know we want 100 req/min for free tier and 1000 for paid, but I'm not sure about the exact scope yet
Вот тикет из трекера: CP-341 — 'Реализовать экспорт отчётов в PDF'. Надо разобраться что именно нужно сделать и подготовить задачу к планированию

our CEO mentioned in the all-hands that we need 'better analytics'. nobody wrote a proper ticket yet. before anyone starts building dashboards, can we at least figure out what the actual requirements are?

I'm picking up INFRA-205 which says 'upgrade postgres from 14 to 16'. seems straightforward but I want to make sure I'm not missing anything — what are the unknowns, what assumptions am I making, what could go wrong?

the QA team found 3 issues with the new checkout flow but the tickets are really vague. before I start fixing anything I want to normalize these into proper task statements with clear scope. here are the ticket IDs: CHECKOUT-88, CHECKOUT-89, CHECKOUT-91

we're starting a new project — building an internal tool for the ops team to manage customer subscriptions. I have a rough idea of what's needed but nothing is written down yet. help me structure this into a proper task with requirements

fix the auth — users can't log in since the last deploy. Error is 'invalid_grant' on the OAuth callback. It's affecting all users on production. We use Keycloak 22 with OIDC. The deploy was 2 hours ago, commit abc123
can you read the file at src/components/Header.tsx and explain what the useAuth hook does?
write a unit test for the calculateDiscount function in services/pricing/calculator.ts
I already have a detailed plan for the migration — here are the 12 steps. Can you start executing step 1: create the new database schema?
run the test suite and tell me which tests are failing
add a .gitignore entry for .env.local files

I need to debug why the API returns 500 on POST /api/orders. Here's the stack trace: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map') at OrderService.createOrder (services/orders/service.ts:45)
create a new React component called UserAvatar that takes a user object and renders a circular avatar with their initials if no image is available
what's the difference between useMemo and useCallback in React?
deploy the current branch to staging using our CI pipeline. the workflow file is at .github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml
